case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-12-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-23-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED SEP-19-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-23-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-12-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-27-2012
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-12-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
